state.title: QCViz-MCP v3
state.chat_text:
Welcome to QCViz-MCP v3. I can run quantum
                    chemistry calculations using PySCF with Gemini AI planning.
                    Ask me to compute energies, optimize geometries, visualize
                    orbitals and ESP maps. Supports Korean input and ion pairs.
                  
                
              
            UMEA м•Ңм•„?MEAлҠ” ліҙнҶө EthanolamineлҘј мқҳлҜён•©лӢҲлӢӨ.л¶„мһҗмӢқ: C2H7NOCID: 700к·јкұ°: resolved from local alias preference for monoethanolamineмӣҗн•ҳмӢңл©ҙ мқҙ л¶„мһҗлҘј кё°мӨҖмңјлЎң HOMO/LUMO, ESP, кө¬мЎ° мөңм Ғнҷ” к°ҷмқҖ кі„мӮ°мқ„ л°”лЎң мқҙм–ҙм„ң м§„н–үн•  мҲҳ мһҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.{
